"Best boots I've ever owned! I'm on my feet 10 to 12 hours a day and these boots are comfortable all day long."
Stop in to a participating store near you to use your coupon and get the Ultimate Fit Experience
VALID IN PARTICIPATING STORES SATURDAY, NOVEMBER 24, 2018 UNTIL NOON

Red Wing Shoe Company, Inc.
314 Main St. Red Wing, MN 55066

*Offer - Save 20% on your entire purchase of all regularly priced items in the store Saturday, November 24th until noon. Available at participating Red Wing Stores only. Offer not available for online purchases.
Not valid with other offers (Examples: past purchases, coupons, sales, discounts, or voucher programs). Some exclusions may apply. Limit one coupon per customer.
